title: Debu di Bingkai Foto Lama
theme: Mempelajari bahwa kedekatan dalam keluarga bisa ditemukan dalam keheningan dan kenangan sederhana, bukan hanya melalui percakapan panjang.

cover.prompt: A cozy, warmly lit home interior, focusing on a soft, plush rug in a tranquil living room. A gentle wisp of steam rises from a cup of jasmine tea placed nearby, hinting at a moment of calm and a welcoming aroma. The room is bathed in a soothing, ambient glow, suggesting a peaceful evening. Through a subtly blurred window in the background, a soft luminescence from distant city structures provides a gentle, contrasting backdrop. The overall mood is one of quiet comfort and serene domesticity.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Rian, a busy young professional, returns home to find his mother, Ibu Wati, cleaning old photo frames with a nostalgic touch. Rian feels an unspoken emotional distance between them due to their changing lives and his busyness. The climax occurs when Ibu Wati points to a childhood photo of Rian and shares a forgotten memory, sparking a deep understanding between them without many words. Rian realizes that true family connection and communication can be found in quiet presence and shared simple memories, not just long conversations.
meta.target_emotion: Warmth, nostalgia, peaceful understanding, familial connection, quiet reflection.
